name: stringman-ui
description: Browser cockpit UI for controlling a cranebot3 robot: 3D telemetry visualization, live camera feeds, and manual/LeRobot-assisted control. Ships as TypeScript source for a host app's own bundler (e.g. Vite) to compile.

scripts.proto: pbjs -t static-module -w es6 -p ../src/nf_robot/protos -o src/generated/proto_bundle.js ../src/nf_robot/protos/*.proto && pbts -o src/generated/proto_bundle.d.ts src/generated/proto_bundle.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run proto && npm run typecheck
